Gold Coast property sales specialists

Sell your home.
Pay one percent.

Traditional agents charge 2–3% commission plus a separate marketing bill. The One Club charges 1% — with photography, floor plans and the full digital campaign included. The only extras are your portal listing and an optional Matterport walkthrough.

1% Commission Gold Coast Premium Photography 3D Walkthroughs Expert Negotiation Floor Plans Digital Marketing Property Styling No Hidden Fees Trusted Agents 1% Commission Gold Coast Premium Photography 3D Walkthroughs Expert Negotiation Floor Plans Digital Marketing Property Styling No Hidden Fees Trusted Agents

Traditional commission
is overdue for
a rethink.

Most sellers still pay 2–3% in commission — and then another $5,000 to $15,000 on top for marketing — often for the same portals, the same photography, and the same sales process. The One Club was built to offer a smarter alternative. We keep our model lean, pass the savings on to sellers, and focus on what actually helps a property sell: accurate pricing, standout presentation, qualified buyer enquiry, and strong negotiation. The result is simple — a premium sales campaign, without the traditional commission bill.

Our full story →
What sellers
get — and more.
01
Clear pricing strategy
We price your home using current comparable sales, local market movement and property-specific factors — so you launch with a strategy, not a guess.
02
Stronger first impressions
Professional photography, floor plans and polished presentation — and an optional Matterport 3D tour — help your property stand out from the moment it hits the market.
03
Better buyer handling
Enquiries are responded to quickly, inspections are managed properly, and buyers get the information they need to move forward with confidence.
04
Expert negotiation
When offers come in, I help you assess them clearly, negotiate with confidence and move toward the strongest possible outcome.

From listing to
settlement.

Five steps. One flat fee. No surprises.

01
Valuation
Data-driven price analysis from hundreds of comparable sales. Free, no obligation.

Preparation

Offer & Sale

For landlords
Property management
that doesn't gouge you.

The property management industry runs on complexity — and complexity means fees. We're stripping it back. Straightforward pricing, transparent reporting, and technology that handles the admin while we focus on what matters: keeping your property tenanted, maintained, and maximising your return.

📸
Professional listing photography
Every rental listing gets AI-enhanced photography. Better photos mean more applications, better tenant quality, and faster vacancy fill. Included, not charged separately.
⚡
Instant tenant enquiry responses
Prospective tenants get answers immediately, 24/7. Inspection bookings are handled automatically. No missed enquiries, no delayed replies.
📋
Thorough tenant screening
Background checks, rental history, income verification. We find the right tenant, not just the fastest tenant. Quality tenancies reduce maintenance headaches and vacancy risk.
💰
Transparent, simple pricing
Management fee, letting fee — published up front. No inspection fees, no lease renewal fees, no statement fees, no exit fees. We charge for what we do, not for everything we can.
📊
Real-time owner dashboard
Log in any time to see rent received, maintenance requests, inspection reports, and upcoming lease renewals. You're always in the picture — no need to chase updates.
🔧
Maintenance coordination
Tenant maintenance requests are triaged, quoted, and managed — with your approval before anything over a set threshold proceeds. You keep control, we handle the logistics.

How it works

How your home
sells for
1% + marketing.

A clear, modern sales process from appraisal to settlement — built to present your home properly, attract serious buyers and negotiate the best possible result.

The process — step by step
01
Accurate pricing from day one
We assess your home using comparable local sales, current market movement and the details that make your property different. The goal is simple: launch with a price strategy grounded in reality, not a number designed to win a listing. You get a realistic price range and a clear recommended approach — no inflated appraisal, no correction three weeks later.
Comparable Sales AnalysisSuburb Trend DataData-Informed Pricing
02
Presentation that gets buyers to stop scrolling
We prepare your campaign assets properly — photography, floor plans and walkthroughs — so your property looks considered, polished and inspection-worthy from the first click. Professional shoot, expert enhancement, virtual staging where appropriate. No upsells, no add-ons. Every listing gets the same treatment.
Professional PhotographyVirtual StagingEnhanced Presentation
03
Clear floor plans buyers actually use
Every listing includes a professionally generated floor plan — accurate, clean, and ready for every portal and print material. Buyers want to understand the layout before they visit. A good floor plan filters out time-wasters and brings in qualified buyers who already know the property suits them.
Floor Plan IncludedPortal-Ready Format
04
Optional Matterport 3D walkthrough
If you want to add a fully interactive Matterport 3D tour, we can arrange it as an affordable add-on. Buyers navigate every room, measure spaces, and understand the flow of the property — all before setting foot inside. For interstate buyers, it's often what turns interest into an offer. It's not included as standard, but it's not expensive and it pays for itself.
Matterport 3D TourRoom MeasurementInterstate-Ready
05
A campaign built to reach the right buyers
Your property goes live across every major portal — realestate.com.au, domain.com.au, and more — the same day photography is ready. You choose your portal exposure level: Standard (~$600–$900), Feature (~$1,200–$1,800), or Premiere (~$2,000–$2,500+). This is the only pass-through cost outside the 1%. Simultaneously, a targeted digital campaign launches to reach qualified buyers who match your property profile.
realestate.com.audomain.com.auTargeted Digital Ads
06
Responsive enquiry and inspection management
Every buyer enquiry gets a fast, accurate response. We make sure buyers get the information they need quickly, inspection opportunities are handled properly, and interest doesn't go cold through poor follow-up. Inspections are managed efficiently, and as a seller you see a real-time picture of buyer activity.
Fast Enquiry ResponseInspection ManagementBuyer Follow-Up
07
Offer management and negotiation
When offers come in, we help you compare them clearly, understand the conditions behind them, and negotiate from a position of confidence. No phone tag, no runaround. You get clear advice on every offer, counter-offer, and condition — with your interests and your best outcome as the only objective.
Offer AssessmentCondition NegotiationSeller-First Advice
08
Contract to settlement support
Once your property is under contract, we stay close to the process and keep things moving toward settlement. Building and pest, finance conditions, settlement adjustments, and handover — all coordinated, all included. One flat 1% commission covers everything from first conversation to final handover. No surprises, no extras.
Settlement CoordinationFinance ConditionsHandover Support

Auto-generated floor plans
Every listing.
Every time.

Buyers want to understand the layout before they visit. A good floor plan filters out time-wasters and brings in qualified buyers who already know the property suits them. We generate accurate, clean floor plans for every listing — no extra cost, no request needed.

The plans are formatted for every use case: portal listing, PDF brochure, and print material. Ground floor and Level 1 are generated separately for two-storey properties.

before you visit.

How the process stays efficient
Smarter systems
behind the scenes.

We use modern tools to keep the campaign efficient and responsive — but the strategy, advice and negotiation stay firmly human.

Valuation
Data-Informed Pricing
Pricing built on comparable local sales, recent price movements, and property-specific factors. Accounts for seasonality, street positioning, and condition — so you launch with a realistic strategy.
Comparable Sales Analysis
Photography
Professional Enhancement
Every image is professionally shot and enhanced — lighting corrected, colours graded, virtual staging added to empty rooms, and sky replacement when needed. Polished presentation, every listing.
Enhanced Photography
Floor Plans
Accurate Floor Plans
From property specifications to a clean, print-ready floor plan. Accurate dimensions, portal-ready formatting, and consistent styling across every listing.
Included Standard
3D Tours
Interactive Walkthrough
Full property capture with Matterport. Interactive navigation, floor plan view, room measurement tool — an affordable optional add-on that buyers love, especially those shopping from interstate.
Matterport
Enquiries
Fast Buyer Responses
Every buyer enquiry gets a quick, accurate reply. Common questions about the property, school zones, and inspections are handled efficiently. Complex enquiries and negotiations go straight to the agent.
Systemised Follow-Up
Campaigns
Targeted Digital Ads
Ad campaigns across Meta and Google targeting buyers actively searching in your price range and suburb. Budget optimised based on enquiry data and campaign performance.
Targeted Reach

About The One Club

Why The One Club
exists.

Traditional agencies built their fee model in a very different market. We built The One Club for today's seller: someone who still wants expert guidance and great marketing, but doesn't see why that should automatically cost 2%–3% commission.

Our position
The average Gold Coast home sells for over $900,000.
A traditional agent at 2.5% takes $22,500 of that.
For what? A listing on the same portals. The same open homes. A junior agent who's been in the industry eighteen months.
We believe selling well should come down to smart pricing, quality presentation, responsive buyer management and strong negotiation — not inflated overheads.
So I built a leaner model. One licensed agent — me — handling everything personally. Professional photography, clear floor plans, 3D walkthroughs and a process that keeps buyers informed and sellers properly supported from appraisal to settlement.
One percent. No hidden fees. No separate marketing invoices. No excuses. Traditional agents charge 2–3% and then hand you a $5,000–$15,000 marketing bill on top.
We're not a discount agent. We're the agent the industry should have built years ago.
What we
actually believe.
◎
Clearer pricing
We believe sellers deserve to know exactly what they're paying for. No inflated appraisals to win a listing. No correction three weeks later. Honest advice from the start.
◈
Better presentation
Homes sell better when they're marketed properly, not cheaply. Professional photography and clear floor plans come standard. Optional Matterport 3D walkthroughs available as an affordable add-on.
◇
Straight advice
No pressure tactics. No manufactured urgency. No theatre. We give you a realistic view of your property's position and let the market do what markets do.
○
Aligned interests
At 1%, the incentive is always to achieve the highest possible price. And because I'm not padding the bill with separate marketing invoices, you'll always know exactly what you're paying for.
◻
Buyers deserve honesty too
We don't string buyers along. We don't hide information to create artificial urgency. A deal that's right for both parties is the only deal worth doing.
◬
Results speak louder
We'll show you exactly what your property achieved — timeline, enquiry numbers, inspection groups, competing offers. Full accountability, every time.
For sellers
Sell your home.
Keep the difference.

Everything a premium agency offers. One flat fee. No hidden costs. On the Gold Coast, the average seller with us keeps between $12,000 and $28,000 more than they would with a traditional agent.

Data-driven valuation
Built from hundreds of comparable sales. No inflated appraisal to win the listing.
AI-enhanced photography
Professional editing, sky replacement, virtual staging — included, not an add-on.
Auto-generated floor plan
Accurate, clean, ready for every portal and print marketing.
Matterport 3D walkthrough Optional add-on
Buyers explore every room before setting foot inside. Affordable to add and well worth it for properties with strong layout appeal.
Portal listings + digital campaign
Listed on every major portal. Targeted social and digital to reach qualified buyers actively searching in your area.
Responsive buyer enquiry handling
No missed enquiries. Buyers get answers within minutes, any hour of the day.
Expert negotiation
One experienced, licensed agent handles every offer. Your interests, always first.

Digital advertising campaign~$800–$2,500Included

Settlement coordinationIncluded
REA / Domain listing level~$400–$2,500+Your choice
Matterport 3D walkthrough (optional)~$300–$500Add-on
These are the only costs outside the 1% commission.
Our commission
1%
of sale price. Portal listing + optional Matterport are the only extras.
For buyers
Find the right
property, faster.

Every listing we manage comes with the full picture. 3D walkthroughs, floor plans, honest property information, and a direct line to the agent. No games, no artificial urgency, no runaround.

We represent the seller — but we believe the best outcome for everyone is a deal where both sides feel they got a fair result.

Full property information upfront
Council rates, body corporate fees, renovation history, school catchment zones — available before you inspect.
3D walkthrough before you visit
Every listing has an interactive Matterport tour. Walk every room, measure spaces, understand the layout — from home.
Online inspection booking
Book an inspection time that suits you — no phone tag, no waiting for callbacks.
Instant answers, any hour
Our AI assistant handles property questions around the clock. Complex questions go directly to the agent within the hour.
No manufactured urgency
We don't fabricate competing interest or pressure buyers into rushed decisions. If there are multiple offers, we'll tell you clearly.
Ready to sell for
1% + marketing?

Get a free valuation and we'll show you what your home could sell for, how we'd take it to market, and exactly what you'd pay.

A smarter way to sell on the Gold Coast — professional marketing, experienced guidance, and 1% commission plus marketing.
